The Evidence

Every action is recorded as an immutable Event.

Nothing Was Forgotten

Every action is recorded as an immutable Event.

The immutable history

Event typeCount
SYSTEM_GENESIS1
MISSION_CREATED1
PLAN_CREATED5
EXPEDITION_CREATED5
WORK_ITEM_CREATED7
OBJECTIVE_ADDED7
MISSION_APPROVED1
EXPEDITION_APPROVED1
EXPEDITION_STARTED1
OBJECTIVE_COMPLETED1
EXPEDITION_COMPLETED1
MISSION_COMPLETED1

Every artifact answers a question

  • events.jsonl — what actually happened
  • timeline.json — how the history is taught
  • commands.json — what was actually typed
  • proof.json — whether governance accepted it
  • replay-report.json — whether state matches history
  • snapshots/ — the approved plan, signed and certified

Two recordings, one journey

Archive A is the original pre-hardening recording, preserved immutably as forensic evidence. Archive B is the same canonical Mission re-executed on the hardened pipeline. This comparison is derived from both archives — not hand-authored.

PropertyArchive A (pre-hardening)Archive B (hardened)
Recorded2026-07-15T01:50:11.541Z2026-07-16T03:58:02.246Z
Events3232
Event type census12 typesidentical to A
Replayconsistent, chain validconsistent, chain valid
Live state hash == replayed hash707567213 == 7075672131824574964 == 1824574964
Aggregate graph violations360
— broken-navigation120
— broken-parent-reference120
— orphan-aggregate120
--strict-graph verdictfailspasses
Snapshot artifact persistednoyes
graphValid in proofabsenttrue
